=> The leading arguments of a join operation must be tables.' script: 
selectedSourceInfo = inspectSource("dfs://stock_daily", "stock_daily_prev");
discoveredSources = getAllAvailableData();
priceSource = choosePriceSource(selectedSourceInfo, discoveredSources);
generateAnalysisReport(
    "// overnight_distance_factor 因子计算
// 1. 计算日内收益率：intraday_return = close / open - 1
// 2. 计算换手率变化量：turnover_change = turnover_rate - prev_turnover_rate
// 3. 计算全市场换手率变化量的截面均值
// 4. 翻转收益率：adjusted_return = if(turnover_change < market_mean, -1 * intraday_return, intraday_return)
// 5. 计算20日移动平均
// 6. 每月最后一个交易日输出因子值

// 加载数据
t = loadTable("dfs://stock_daily", "stock_daily_prev")

// 按股票代码和时间排序
t = select ts_code as securityId, trade_date as tradeTime, open, close, turnover_rate from t order by securityId, tradeTime

// 计算日内收益率
t = select *, close / open - 1 as intraday_return from t context by securityId

// 计算换手率变化量（当日换手率 - 前一日换手率）
t = select *, turnover_rate - prev(turnover_rate) as turnover_change from t context by securityId

// 计算每日全市场换手率变化量的截面均值
market_mean = select tradeTime, avg(turnover_change) as market_turnover_mean from t where isValid(turnover_change) group by tradeTime

// 合并市场均值到个股数据
t = lj(t, market_mean, `tradeTime)

// 翻转收益率：低于市场均值的股票日内收益率乘以-1
t = select *, iif(turnover_change < market_turnover_mean, -1 * intraday_return, intraday_return) as adjusted_return from t

// 计算20日移动平均的翻转后收益率
t = select *, mavg(adjusted_return, 20) as factor_value from t context by securityId

// 筛选每月最后一个交易日
// 首先标记每月最后一天
t = select *, monthEnd(tradeTime) as month_end from t
t = select *, tradeTime == month_end as is_month_end from t

// 生成最终结果表：每月最后一个交易日的因子值
result = select tradeTime, securityId, "overnight_distance_factor" as factorname, factor_value as value from t where is_month_end = true and isValid(factor_value)

// 按时间和股票排序
result = select * from result order by tradeTime, securityId

result",
    "execute",
    string(priceSource["priceDbname"]),
    string(priceSource["priceTbname"]),
    string(priceSource["priceDate"]),
    string(priceSource["priceSymbol"]),
    string(priceSource["priceCol"]),
    "dfs://stock_daily",
    "stock_daily_prev"
)

fallback.note: v1 does not run a separate evaluation engine; this file preserves a stable artifact contract.
